steps.title: Identify the y-intercept
steps.content: The line passes through $(0, -19)$. Since $x = 0$, this point is on the y-axis, and the y-coordinate is the y-intercept: $b = -19$.

steps.title: Apply slope-intercept form
steps.content:
With $m = -2$ and $b = -19$:
$$f(x) = -2x - 19$$That matches choice C — C is correct.
